name: gtm-pipeline
description: Plan a go-to-market campaign, write the launch copy, then generate social posts. Chains the quality planner → the long-form writer → the fast social model, each handing its output to the next.

steps.note: quality (qwen3.6), brief → structured GTM plan (positioning, segments, channels, sequence)
write (gpt-oss), plan → ready-to-ship launch assets (announcement, email, headlines, CTA)
chat (gemma4), assets → platform-tailored LinkedIn / X / thread posts
